params.name: ENIAC Prototype
params.source: Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Murikan Treasure Map (10%), Wishing (0.36%)
params.description:
On Dec 12, 1946, the world's first electronic digital computer was created.

The two-year R&D of ENIAC was a hard time for engineers Goldstein, Mauchly and Eckert. Fully presenting Turin's idea, ENIAC is able to design various programs based on the engineer's requirements. It can calculate the projectile of a cannonball in just 20 seconds, even faster than the speed of the cannonball itself. With these functions, it has become a milestone in the history of computers and a new starting point for  …
